name: AULA F2022 Mechanical Gaming Keyboard

With anti-ghosting technology , all keypresses are accurately registered, making it perfect for intense gaming sessions
Featuring multimedia function keys via Fn , this gaming keyboard is fully compatible with Windows XP/7/8/10 , ensuring seamless performance
Elevate your gaming setup with the AULA F2022 Mechanical Keyboard , designed for durability and accuracy
